title: Protecting the World's Oceans
description: For questions 17 – 24, read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line. There is an example at the beginning (0).

content.text: Our oceans are home to a (0) remarkable variety of life, from microscopic plankton to the largest whales on Earth. The (17) diversity of species found in marine environments is truly extraordinary. However, many ocean creatures now face the threat of (18) extinction due to hunting, pollution, and habitat loss. Industrial waste introduces (19) pollutants into the sea that accumulate in the bodies of fish and other marine organisms. Overfishing at the current rate is clearly (20) unsustainable, as fish populations cannot recover fast enough to meet global demand. Better (21) protection of marine areas through ocean reserves has been shown to help species recover. Strong (22) government action is needed to enforce international laws against illegal fishing. Scientists warn that (23) significant damage to coral reefs could make them functionally extinct within decades. Without urgent global cooperation, the future of our oceans may seem (24) hopeless.

example.text: Our oceans are home to a (0) REMARKABLE variety of life, from microscopic plankton to the largest whales on Earth. (REMARK)

questions.explanation: A noun is needed after 'The'; 'diverse' becomes 'diversity' by changing '-se' to '-sity'.
A noun is needed after 'the threat of'; 'extinct' becomes 'extinction' by adding the suffix '-ion'.
A plural noun is needed after 'introduces'; 'pollute' becomes 'pollutant' with the suffix '-ant', then pluralised.
A negative adjective is needed; 'sustain' → 'sustainable', then the prefix 'un-' creates 'unsustainable'.
A noun is needed after 'Better'; 'protect' becomes 'protection' by adding the suffix '-ion'.
A noun is needed before 'action'; 'govern' becomes 'government' by adding the suffix '-ment'.
An adjective is needed before 'damage'; 'signify' becomes 'significant' by changing '-ify' to '-icant'.
An adjective is needed after 'seem'; 'hope' becomes 'hopeless' by adding the suffix '-less' to mean 'without hope'.
